seoTitle: Tuntable Creek vs Tura Beach — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Tuntable Creek and Tura Beach. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Tuntable Creek vs Tura Beach: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Tuntable Creek and Tura Beach.
heading: Tuntable Creek vs Tura Beach — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Tuntable Creek, New South Wales and Tura Beach, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Tura Beach has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Tuntable Creek (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Tuntable Creek or Tura Beach safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Tuntable Creek has a flood risk score of 57/100, while Tura Beach scores 26/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Tuntable Creek scores 55/100 for bushfire risk. Tura Beach scores 26/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Tuntable Creek or Tura Beach?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Tura Beach has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.18% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
